name: Moov

seo.title: Moov — Payment Gateway / PSP

when_to_use: Open-source ACH transfer and card acceptance for US fintech products
Bank account verification and money movement for US payment platforms
Wallet creation and fund transfer API for US marketplace or gig platforms
Building custom US money movement workflows with open-source banking API

pros: Open-source infra style with transparent approach
ACH, cards, wallets in unified API
review.verdict: Promising US money-movement API with developer-first DNA — credible modern alternative to Dwolla.
review.best_for: US startups moving money across ACH, cards, and wallets
review.not_for: Non-US platforms or teams needing mature enterprise tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
